<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]][[de:Holz-Büffel]][[fr:Buffle de bois]][[hak:Yet-chhiú]][[ja:乙丑]][[ko:을축]][[nds:Holt-Oss]][[vi:Ất Sửu]][[za:Ietcouj]][[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]][[zh-yue:乙丑]][[zh:乙丑]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Ox|kanji=乙丑|romaji=kinoto ushi|onyomi=otsuchū|p=yǐchǒu|w=i-ch'ou|mi=i²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 cau2|j=jyut6 cau2|ci=jyt̚ tsʰɐu̯²|mc=ʔit tʂʰjuwX|oc-bs=Ɂik ʈʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Ox also known as  Kinoto-Ushi''' (乙丑, きのとうし, おつぼくのうし, いっちゅう) is one of the combinations of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the second combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|WD=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}} and preceding {{ill|Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}}. According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Kinoto (乙)|ja|乙|zh|乙|gan|乙|hak|Yet (thiên-kôn)|ja|Kinoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|vi|Ất|za|Iet (diengan)|zh-min-nan|It (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|乙|zh|乙|lt=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents {{ill|yin|en|yin|WD=Q295951|lt=yin|1=Yin}} {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} [[Ox (zodiac)|Ox (丑)]] represents {{ill|yin|en|yin|WD=Q295951|lt=yin|1=Yin}} {{ill|Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)}}, creating a relationship of {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Wood conquers Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Ox (乙丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: itchū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eulchuk (을축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu

<!--
==
* Yin Wood Ox (乙丑) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: きのとうし (kinoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: おつぼくのうし (otsuboku-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: おつちゅう (otsuchū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulchuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Sửu

-->
==Years of Yin Wood Ox==
Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 5 when divided by 60 are years of Kinoto-Ushi.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Kinoto-Ushi'''
|-
! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* {{ill|5|en|5|WD=Q203|lt=5|1=5}}
* {{ill|65|en|65|WD=Q4642104|lt=65|1=65}}
* {{ill|125|en|125|WD=Q564419|lt=125|1=125}}
* {{ill|185|en|185|WD=Q33340|lt=185|1=185}}
* {{ill|245|en|245|WD=Q32308|lt=245|1=245}}
* {{ill|305|en|305|WD=Q33642|lt=305|1=305}}
* {{ill|365|en|365|WD=Q563786|lt=365|1=365}}
* {{ill|425|en|425|WD=Q31183|lt=425|1=425}}

* {{ill|485|en|485|WD=Q31001|lt=485|1=485}}
* {{ill|545|en|545|WD=Q32860|lt=545|1=545}}
* {{ill|605|en|605|WD=Q33252|lt=605|1=605}}
* {{ill|665|en|665|WD=Q30684|lt=665|1=665}}
* {{ill|725|en|725|WD=Q23552|lt=725|1=725}}
* {{ill|785|en|785|WD=Q30554|lt=785|1=785}}
* {{ill|845|en|845|WD=Q25103|lt=845|1=845}}
* {{ill|905|en|905|WD=Q24239|lt=905|1=905}}
* {{ill|965|en|965|WD=Q23647|lt=965|1=965}}
|
* {{ill|1025|en|1025|WD=Q19267|lt=1025|1=1025}}
* {{ill|1085|en|1085|WD=Q19459|lt=1085|1=1085}}
* {{ill|1145|en|1145|WD=Q19624|lt=1145|1=1145}}
* {{ill|1205|en|1205|WD=Q5229|lt=1205|1=1205}}
* {{ill|1265|en|1265|WD=Q5516|lt=1265|1=1265}}
* {{ill|1325|en|1325|WD=Q5774|lt=1325|1=1325}}
* {{ill|1385|en|1385|WD=Q6350|lt=1385|1=1385}}
* {{ill|1445|en|1445|WD=Q6426|lt=1445|1=1445}}
* {{ill|1505|en|1505|WD=Q6153|lt=1505|1=1505}}
* {{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}}
* {{ill|1625|en|1625|WD=Q6826|lt=1625|1=1625}}
* {{ill|1685|en|1685|WD=Q7660|lt=1685|1=1685}}
* {{ill|1745|en|1745|WD=Q7586|lt=1745|1=1745}}
* {{ill|1805|en|1805|WD=Q6898|lt=1805|1=1805}}
* {{ill|1865|en|1865|WD=Q7708|lt=1865|1=1865}}
* {{ill|1925|en|1925|WD=Q18107|lt=1925|1=1925}}
* {{ill|1985|en|1985|WD=Q2431|lt=1985|1=1985}}
|
* {{ill|2045|en|2045|WD=Q49920|lt=2045|1=2045}}
* [[:en:2105|2105]]
* [[:en:2165|2165]]
* [[:en:2225|2225]]
* [[:en:2285|2285]]
* [[:en:2345|2345]]
* [[:en:2405|2405]]
* [[:en:2465|2465]]
* [[:en:2525|2525]]
* [[2585]]
* [[2645]]
* [[2705]]
* [[2765]]
* [[2825]]
* [[2885]]
* [[:en:2945|2945]]
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Ox==
The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 3 or 8 (Heavenly Stems 癸 or 戊) corresponds to Kinoto-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar terms|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Shōkan|1=Xiaohan}} to the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) in traditional contexts.

==Days of Yin Wood Ox==
=== Rekichū ===
Days of Kinoto-Ushi are associated with the following annotations in the {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|暦注下段|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}:
* {{ill|Kyoueibi|ja|凶会日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoueibi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applicable in the 3rd and 10th lunar months.
* {{ill|Gokubi|ja|五墓日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gokubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – applies to individuals whose {{ill|Na-in|ja|納音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Na-in|1=natchin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10465180}} corresponds to the Wood element.
* {{ill|Shinkichinichi|ja|神吉日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkichinichi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 暦注下段|1=Rekichū Gedan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11514957}} – auspicious for spiritual matters.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]]
[[zh-yue:乙丑]]

{{translated page|ja|乙丑|qq=Yin Wood Ox|version=84123731|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ceb:Wood Ox]]
[[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Büffelvi]]
[[de:Yin Wood Ox]]

[[ja:乙丑]]
[[zh:乙丑]]
[[ko:을축]]
[[fr:Buffle de bois]]
[[de:Holz-Büffel]]

[[af:Houtos (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Büffelen]]
[[en:Wood Ox]]
[[fr:Buffle de boishak]]
[[it:Yit-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Ất Sửuza]]
[[za:Ietceij]]
[[ar:Yin Wood Ox]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Yin Wood Ox--><!--Yin Wood Ox--><!--Yin Wood Ox--><!--Yin Wood Ox--><!--Yin Wood Ox-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]]
[[hak:Yet-chhiú]]
[[nds:Holt-Oss]]
[[vi:Ất Sửu]]
[[za:Ietcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:乙丑]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ĭk-tiū]]
[[hak:Yet-chhiú]]
[[nds:Holt-Oss]]
[[vi:Ất Sửu]]
[[za:Ietcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:It-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:乙丑]]
{{wikidata link|Q599762}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
